The '''Executive Directorship Board''', otherwise known as the '''Direx Board''' or the '''Board of Directors''', was the executive body of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]].

It had 55 members, known as [[Direx]]s, who were all high ranking business executives with 37 of those seats consisting of voting sponsor corporations. A further 18 seats rotated among the non-voting but contributing members. This allowed them approval rights on the budgets of the CSA.

The Direx Board was led by the [[ExO]]. Other posts included the [[Prex]] ([[President/Legends|President]]), [[Viceprex/Legends|Viceprex]], [[Auditor-General]] and the [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]] that represented the interests of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
